meta.name: MDR
meta.source: Recovered from the local export on 2026-03-06
meta.recoveryNote: This file was normalized from a corrupted export. One truncated routine line and one formula note remain placeholders.

timeline.title: Morning core stack
timeline.note: Start with CMZD, methyl B-12 + folate, fish oil, and Q10.

timeline.title: 30B probiotic window
timeline.note: Keep the probiotic around 10:00 as the fixed morning follow-up.

timeline.title: Meal-dependent support
timeline.note: Use BPG, Lacto, or GlutenEase only when the meal requires them.

timeline.title: Evening wrap
timeline.note: Finish with GSH, diltiazem, and the after-dinner ASH slot.

routine.title: Morning supplement stack
routine.note: Take the breakfast stack and anchor the day with CMZD.

routine.title: 30B probiotic checkpoint
routine.note: Keep this as the fixed morning follow-up item.

routine.title: Supplement prep check
routine.note: Keep the frequently used supplements organized before meals and follow-ups.

routine.title: Meal-triggered support
routine.note: Use BPG, Lacto, or GlutenEase only when the meal needs support. Track NRT separately.

routine.title: Routine note needs manual recovery
routine.note: One routine line in the original export was truncated. Replace this placeholder if the original note is recovered.

routine.title: Fluticasone nasal care
routine.note: Keep the nasal routine available as part of the support flow. Confirm the original dosing note manually if needed.

routine.title: Dinner and evening support
routine.note: Use the ASH slot after dinner and keep diltiazem in the evening plan.

routine.title: Evening glutathione wrap
routine.note: Take GSH and start the lower-stimulation night path.

recipesOrFormulas.name: Formula note needs manual recovery
recipesOrFormulas.formula: The original formula text was corrupted in the source export. Replace this placeholder from the original source if it becomes available.
